00
43

Lets fix one problem on this website. 
we have the four quizzes -- general physics, us history, us geography, and us civics on the nav menu on the home page
however, when I go to top stories or local stories, I can't get to the navigation menu. I can't even click on the home button anymore
and I don't even know how to get to the other components such as playground
how can we automate this the right way so every single component that is routable is included in the navigation 
and every single component that is routable has a navigation so you can go to any other routable component? 
also while doing that, please also add as much unit tests as possible in the spec dot ts files for the component files we touch 
please use the latest industry best practices and SOLID principles
